data.title: Terra Innovatum and GSR III Acquisition Corp. secure $5 million PIPE commitment, totaling $42.5 million for business combination.
data.description: A partnership between Terra Innovatum Srl and GSR III Acquisition Corp. revealed on Oct. 2, 2025, an increase in private investment in public equity ("PIPE") capital as part of their merger. The total equity funding allocated reached $42.5 million, with around $37 million coming from PIPE funding and roughly $5.5 million from a bridge facility. Notably, the public company involved was Nasdaq-listed GSRT. This move signifies a significant financial commitment to support the development of micro-modular nuclear reactors.

data.title: PROtect acquires Airde Mechanical Services to expand capabilities in high-access infrastructure, with expertise in rope access and suspended platforms.
data.description: PROtect, LLC based in WICHITA, Kan., has recently acquired a company specializing in rope access, suspended platforms, and complex access solutions. This acquisition is set to enhance PROtect's national platform and strengthen its position in the market. The move was confirmed on Oct. 2, 2025, as part of PROtect's strategy to expand its expertise. This acquisition adds valuable resources and expertise to PROtect's portfolio, contributing to its safety, reliability, and compliance services.

data.title: New Richmond American community, Pine Grove Reserve, debuts in St. Cloud, Fla. with designer homes. Opening announced on Oct. 1, 2025.
data.description: In St. Cloud, Florida, on October 1, 2025, Richmond American Homes of Florida, LP, under Sekisui House U.S., Inc., is proud to introduce the Grand Opening of Pine Grove Reserve. This new community presents a range of luxurious homes featuring designer details. The development showcases an impressive collection of houses, with the opening event marking an exciting milestone for the company.

data.title: BW Walch becomes preferred provider of Math resources in New Mexico with full state adoption after review.
data.description: Leading math solutions provider, BW Walch, achieves full state adoption for their Integrated Pathway Math programs in New Mexico on October 2, 2025. After a thorough evaluation by local educators, the company's instructional materials gained approval. This endorsement signifies a significant achievement for BW Walch in solidifying their position as a top choice for math curriculums.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims against KBR for losses suffered between May 6, 2025, and June 19, 2025. Contact to discuss legal options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who faced losses in KBR between May 6, 2025, and June 19, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore their available options. If you were impacted by the situation with KBR during this period and wish to delve into your legal rights, you are encouraged to contact him at the provided number.

data.title: Avesi Partners invests in Mosaic Consulting Group for growth; strategic move in Stamford, CT on Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: Avesi Partners ("Avesi") recently revealed a strategic investment in Mosaic Consulting Group ("Mosaic"), a prominent company specializing in organic and M&A-driven growth activities. The investment was disclosed on October 2, 2025, in Stamford, Connecticut. This significant move aims to bolster Mosaic's operations and expansion efforts in the industry.

data.title: Air Products to showcase high-quality gases and tech for battery industry at Battery Show North America in Detroit, MI.
data.description: Air Products (NYSE: APD) is set to present its premium gases, application technologies, equipment, and services tailored for the lithium-ion battery sector at the Battery Show North America in Detroit, Mich. The event will be held at Huntington Place from October 2, 2025. This initiative aims to bolster support for the industry through showcasing cutting-edge solutions.
